faculty: Faculty of Science and Information Technology
overview: Physical Education and Sport Science program launched for the first time in private universities in Bangladesh with UGC approval! Produces educated sports persons!
waiver_info: Result-based waiver (SSC and HSC/undergraduate), Waiver on SGPA (semester result), Female quota, Need-based waiver, Player quota, Waiver for DIU alumni, Group admission waiver from the same organization, Freedom fighter quota waiver, Talent scholarship program, Special waiver for international students
eligibility: SSC and HSC certificates / testimonials & mark sheets / transcripts original copies for verification & photocopies for admission. Four (4) copies of passport size recent photograph. NID / Birth Certificate / Passport photocopy (student & parents).
